scripts.dev: mkdir -p .npm-cache && npm_config_cache="$PWD/.npm-cache" npx --yes concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm -w server run start:dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.dev:server: mkdir -p .npm-cache && npm_config_cache="$PWD/.npm-cache" npm -w server run start:dev
scripts.dev:client: mkdir -p .npm-cache && npm_config_cache="$PWD/.npm-cache" npm -w client run dev
scripts.lint: npm -w server run lint && npm -w client run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm -w server run lint:fix && npm -w client run lint:fix
